source.name: IBM Carbon Design System
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Keep forms short and only ask for information that has clear value.
Group related controls and use consistent spacing between fields.
Place submit actions after the fields and keep the primary action visually clear.
accessibility_notes: Use real form controls with labels and error text tied to fields.
Keep keyboard flow linear and predictable.
implementation_hints: Use for serious enterprise forms where clarity beats visual flourish.
Represent validation and error states in code from the first version.
Avoid collecting optional fields unless they improve the task outcome.

quality.notes: Official Carbon form guidance summarized for model retrieval.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Carbon form patterns for enterprise data entry: short forms, grouped related fields, explicit labels/helper/error text, clear submit behavior, and accessible keyboard flow.
